description: An environmental officer checks the latest water quality monitoring data to ensure the mine is compliant with its discharge permit.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the latest water quality sample results from the downstream monitoring point.

expected_outcome.value: The latest lab analysis for pH, suspended solids, and heavy metals is retrieved.

nodes.task_description: Compare the results against the compliance limits set in the mine's environmental permit.

expected_outcome.value: The comparison shows all parameters are well within the allowed limits.

nodes.task_description: Generate the monthly water quality report for submission to the environmental regulatory agency.

expected_outcome.value: A compliant report is automatically generated and ready for submission.
